message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow\n**with SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning** box "HealthSphere" #LightBlue participant "Apigee Edge" as AE #Orange participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP #Orange end box participant "HealthCloud" as HC #Green participant "Embedded Browser" as EB #Green HC -> EB : EB -> AE : GET /authorize?response_type=code AE --> EB : 302 https:// (SAML OR token) group SAML Authentication EB -> AE : POST /oauth2/saml AE -> OHP : POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current OHP -> OHP : Verify SAMLResponse OHP --> AE AE -> AE : Generate authorization code AE --> EB : 302 https://?code= end HC -> AE : POST /token?code= AE --> HC : 200 access_token + refresh_token @enduml ```
